# Manpreet's Developer Profile

This is the developer portfolio website for Manpreet, an Arch Linux enthusiast, systems programmer, and creator of developer tooling, systems utilities, and Android apps.

## Key Information

- **Name**: Manpreet
- **Email**: manpreet10542@gmail.com
- **GitHub**: [github.com/manpreet113](https://github.com/manpreet113)
- **LinkedIn**: [linkedin.com/in/manpreet113](https://linkedin.com/in/manpreet113)
- **Timezone**: IST (UTC +5:30)
- **Location**: Haryana, India

## Main Pages

- [Home Page](https://manpreet.tech/)
- [About Page](https://manpreet.tech/about)
- [Projects Page](https://manpreet.tech/projects)
- [Contact Page](https://manpreet.tech/contact)

## Featured Projects

- [ax](https://github.com/Manpreet113/ax) — A pacman wrapper for Arch Linux written in Rust.
- [Vellum](https://github.com/Manpreet113/Vellum) — A modern Android reader for CBZ, EPUB, and PDF written in Kotlin.
- [HeadMod](https://github.com/Manpreet113/HeadMod) — An event-driven Discord moderation bot written in Rust.
- [shortun](https://github.com/Manpreet113/shortun) — A URL shortener built with Axum (Rust), PostgreSQL, and TypeScript.
